parts.text: I’d like to discuss how to smoothly transition from a 3G device to a new
G/
G phone.
Please provide options for upgrading my phone to be compatible with the latest network.
I’m calling to make sure my current device won’t be affected by the 3G shutdown.
I want to know if my plan includes assistance with hardware upgrades during the network transition.
Can I exchange my 3G device for a model that supports
G or 5G?
I need a new phone to take advantage of faster network speeds.
I want to upgrade my device before the 3G network is retired.
I’m looking to switch devices because my current phone is limited to 3G.
Can you guide me through upgrading my phone for the new network?
I want to ensure my phone will work after the network transition.
I need information on device options compatible with 4G and 5G networks.
Please advise on how to update my device to the latest network technology.
I’m calling about upgrading my phone because 3G service is being discontinued.
I’d like to trade in my old device and get one that supports 5G.
Can you help me with a hardware upgrade for the upcoming network migration?
I want to know if my current phone will continue working after the 3G network shuts down.
I need assistance switching from a 3G device to a newer model.
How do I upgrade my device to be compatible with the 4G or 5G network?
I’d like to replace my phone since my current one doesn’t support the new network.
Can you explain the process for transitioning from the 3G network to 5G?
I’m calling to upgrade my hardware for 4G compatibility.
My device won’t work properly after the 3G network is retired . what should I do?
I need to discuss arrangements for migrating from the 3G network to a newer network.
Can you tell me what my options are for upgrading from 3G to
G or 5G?
I want to upgrade my phone because my current device is only 3G compatible.
